summary: package eu.kalafatic.utils.interfaces; import static eu.kalafatic.utils.constants.FConstants.PREFERENCES; import eu.kalafatic.utils.preferences.ECorePreferences; public interface ILog { int MAX_LOGS = PREFERENCES.getInt(ECorePreferences.MAX_LOGS.getName(), (Integer) ECorePreferences.MAX_LOGS.getDef()); boolean LOG_CONSOLE = PREFERENCES.getBoolean(ECorePreferences.LOG_CONSOLE.getName(), (Boolean) ECorePreferences.LOG_CONSOLE.getValue()); String LOG_EVENT = PREFERENCES.get(ECorePreferences.LOG_EVENT.getName(), (String) ECorePreferences.LOG_EVENT.getDef()); void log(String logName, String msg); void log(String logName, Exception exception);
